description: Temporary: role-templates is []. Restore from xs-security.role-templates.json after BTP manual cleanup, then cf update-service. Scopes + attributes unchanged. No role-collections in this file.

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Agent.User
scopes.description: Open chat; use agents assigned to user's groups.

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Agent.Author
scopes.description: Create and edit agents within policy.

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Agent.Admin
scopes.description: Manage MCP servers, tools, groups, policies, elevated flags.

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Agent.Audit
scopes.description: Read-only access to all records, sessions, and tool-call logs.

attributes.name: dept
attributes.description: Department code for agent resolution. Mapped from IAS customAttribute1 via BTP role attribute mapping.
